ELPAC Level 4
NWEA 1000–1300L
DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS12-L4-10001300-HSCE-MCF-NAV-01  |  Deck B

The Tulare Beacon Case

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is Mr. Halloran’s main point about the two news stories?
2QUESTION 2: According to Mr. Halloran, why does the Tulare Beacon name the three families while the national wire does not?
3QUESTION 3: Devin ends by asking whether the local paper is “more accountable to the people it’s writing about,” and Mr. Halloran confirms this is “the heart of the case.” What does Devin’s reframing show she now understands?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
